user_prompt: Skip the overnight batch tonight, I want to review each Tier 1 manually first.
actual_output:
**Tier 1 Review Queue (18 High-Match Roles)**

All 18 roles meet or exceed your criteria ($150K+, Senior Frontend/React-focused, NYC-area). Each has a fully customized resume (bullet-point reordering, keyword alignment, achievement tailoring) and a company-specific cover letter. No applications have been submitted.

### Tier 1 Summary Table

| # | Company | Role | Comp Range | Location | Match Score | Key Customization Notes |
|---|---------|------|------------|----------|-------------|-------------------------|
| 1 | Stripe | Senior Frontend Engineer | $168–195K | NYC Hybrid | 94% | PCI-compliant UI bullets added; GraphQL + React performance emphasis |
| 2 | Datadog | Senior Software Engineer (Frontend) | $175–210K | NYC Hybrid | 91% | Observability dashboard experience highlighted; TypeScript-first reordering |
| 3 | Robinhood | Senior Frontend Engineer (Trading Platform) | $160–190K | NYC Hybrid | 89% | Fintech trading UI bullets moved to top; real-time data emphasis |
| 4 | Ramp | Senior Frontend Engineer | $165–200K | NYC (Remote OK) | 88% | Spend management + automation examples tailored to their product |
| 5 | Anthropic | Senior Frontend Engineer (Console) | $170–205K | NYC Office | 87% | AI tool integration bullets added; clean, performant UI focus |
| 6 | JPMorgan Chase | Senior Software Engineer (React) | $155–185K + bonus | NYC Hybrid | 86% | Enterprise-scale + accessibility bullets prioritized |
| 7 | Notion | Senior Frontend Engineer | $160–195K | NYC Hybrid | 85% | Block-based editing and collaboration examples emphasized |
| 8 | Brex | Senior Frontend Engineer (Corporate Card) | $162–192K | NYC Hybrid | 84% | Fintech spend + compliance language matched to JD |
| 9 | Perplexity | Senior Frontend Engineer | $158–188K | NYC Remote-eligible | 83% | Search + AI response UI patterns added |
| 10 | Capital One | Principal Frontend Engineer | $172–205K | NYC Hybrid | 82% | Banking compliance and design system bullets moved forward |
| 11 | Figma | Senior Software Engineer (FigJam) | $165–198K | NYC Office | 81% | Real-time collaboration and canvas rendering examples |
| 12 | Airtable | Senior Frontend Engineer | $159–189K | NYC Hybrid | 80% | Database UI + automation pattern matching |
| 13 | MongoDB | Senior Frontend Engineer (Atlas) | $157–187K | NYC Hybrid | 79% | Cloud dashboard and data visualization bullets |
| 14 | Toast | Senior Software Engineer (Frontend) | $152–182K | NYC Hybrid | 78% | Restaurant SaaS + POS integration examples |
| 15 | Bloomberg | Senior Frontend Developer | $160–190K | NYC Office | 77% | Terminal-style + high-performance data display |
| 16 | Adobe | Senior Frontend Engineer (Experience Cloud) | $158–188K | NYC Hybrid | 76% | Design tool integration and component system focus |
| 17 | Palantir | Senior Software Engineer (Frontend) | $165–200K | NYC Hybrid | 75% | Ontology + data-heavy UI examples |
| 18 | Retool | Senior Frontend Engineer | $155–185K | NYC Hybrid | 74% | Internal tool building experience heavily emphasized |

**Next Steps**
- Reply with the **job number(s)** (e.g., “1, 3, 7” or “1-5”) to see the full customized resume bullets, cover letter, and ATS keyword analysis for each.
- Or say “approve all” / “approve X–Y” once you’ve reviewed what you want.
- I will hold the entire batch until you explicitly approve submission.

Which jobs would you like to review first?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the user's instruction to skip the automated batch and instead provided a detailed list of the Tier 1 roles for manual review as requested.
